scripts.generate:api:application-server:specs: cd server/application-server && sh -c 'if command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1 && docker info >/dev/null 2>&1; then ./mvnw verify -DskipTests=true -Dapp.profiles=specs; else SPRING_DOCKER_COMPOSE_ENABLED=false ./mvnw verify -DskipTests=true -Dapp.profiles=specs; fi'
scripts.generate:api:application-server:client: pnpm run generate:api:application-server:clean && pnpm --filter webapp run openapi-ts
scripts.generate:api:application-server: pnpm run generate:api:application-server:specs && pnpm run generate:api:application-server:client
scripts.format:java: node --import tsx scripts/run-quiet.ts prettier --write "server/application-server/src/**/*.java" --config-precedence prefer-file --config server/application-server/.prettierrc.yaml --ignore-path server/application-server/.prettierignore
scripts.format:java:check: node --import tsx scripts/run-quiet.ts prettier --check "server/application-server/src/**/*.java" --config-precedence prefer-file --config server/application-server/.prettierrc.yaml --ignore-path server/application-server/.prettierignore
scripts.check:webhook-ingest: pnpm run format:webhook-ingest:check && pnpm run lint:webhook-ingest && pnpm run typecheck:webhook-ingest
scripts.check:server: pnpm run format:server:check && pnpm run lint:server
scripts.format: pnpm run format:server && pnpm run format:client
scripts.format:check: pnpm run format:server:check && pnpm run format:client:check
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:webapp && pnpm run typecheck:webhook-ingest && pnpm run typecheck:scripts

pnpm.//: overrides + peerDependencyRules live in pnpm-workspace.yaml — pnpm 11's documented location.
